review_title: Awesome for remote working
description: Nothing short of amazing. Management/ time tracking tools are usually so complicated to use, they make your life more difficult instead of easier. Apploye solves that!
author: Florin T.
pros: Great for planning and tracking the productive time spent by the development & sales team on different projects and activities. Perfect for understanding what the real cost of implementing a project inside the team. The UI is friendly, you quickly understand how to use the product, and perks like offline sync make it seamless to use
cons: Haven't found anything not to like yet :)

review_title: Best deal I have ever made!
author: Tuhin A.
pros: User-friendly dashboard, easy to track member's activity, screenshot, billing calculation, monthly reporting...and obviously pricing!
cons: Honestly I don't see anything yet to mark as con!

review_title: Quite useful to monitor employees activity
description: Apploye is quite useful & necessary app during these time when our team is working remotely since over 6 months now. I am easily able to track their activity & thus ensure not much of the time is wasted.
author: Vineet G.
pros: - Easy to know what the team is doing - I can now track where the time is being spent by the team - UI is quite clean
cons: - I felt it could have been better if they had an app for iPad tracking - Employees may feel uncomfortable with the screenshots that are taken

review_title: Excellent!
description: Very good and practical. I really like the simplicity of the software. The customer support is prompt and very kind.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Project management and screenshot monitoring. I really like these features because they allowed me to increase the productivity.
cons: Invoices. The UX is not good, and the features are less. Useless feature but it has so much potential.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: best tracking software ever
description: overall experience is very very good. everything is work smooth, cool UI, integrations available
author: Darshan V.
pros: Easy setup, all type reporting, easy to manage user and get invoice ready, lifetime deal, no pay monthly, work with slow internet
cons: still not found any type of problem in this software

review_title: Value for Money
description: The support team is very active and dedicated to assisting us promptly and efficiently. They are available to answer your questions, resolve any issues you may encounter, and provide guidance whenever you need help
author: Nasrin Hossain P.
pros: They employ an effective method for data tracking and maintain the information within a highly user-friendly dashboard.
cons: I wanted to inform you that recording is not permitted on this platform. Recording could add extra value.

review_title: .Useful tool for remote and onsite Teams
description: I had a great experience using the platform, it's easy to use and able to manage the time in and time out of all our employees.
author: Aljane D.
pros: It's very affordable and easy to use time tracking platform. Great in managing the teams attendance and screenshots.
cons: Roles assigned to user is limited to 2 only. Also, the hours tracked sometimes the system didn't record it.

review_title: Cost effective tool and it does the job!
author: Jacques W.
pros: The cost of the tool is very affordable for a small business or team. The support is also pretty responsive.
cons: The screenshot UI can be not so user friendly. I would suggest putting a nav bar at the bottom as well so you don't have to scroll all the way back up.

review_title: Support is amazing and very responsive.
description: I'm a freelancer. I'm working on an organization that uses Apploye. I encountered an issue, and the support has been able to identify the issue, and we got it fixed (the issue is timezone, which makes my Apployee didn't capture screenshots.) Love this.
author: May B.
pros: Real-time tracking experience. I am confident that my work is logged and recorded properly. I also love that freelancers can delete time only when they have the right permission. And of course, their support is amazing (real human).
cons: None so far. I like all of the features that Apployee currently has. I think Apploye is perfect in its purpose from the freelancer's perspective.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simple, Effective, and Great Value for Money!
author: Sanjeev K.
pros: Apploye has been a boost to my team’s productivity. The user interface is intuitive. I love the detailed insights into how much time is spent on tasks, which helps us better understand project costs. Features like activity tracking, screenshots and apps, and URL monitoring are a great bonus. The pricing is also excellent, especially for the value you get!
cons: I had some issues in the beginning, but the customer support team was extremely helpful. They assisted me in getting started with Apploye.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great so far! Highly recommended
author: Tauhid Hasan R.
pros: Easy to use, has all the necessary features to track and monitor!
cons: Not a con, rather an area of improvement: Can add a big popup over other apps when the device comes back from sleep mode. Would help users not to forget about activating it again.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: LIfesaver for Time Tracking a Team
description: It's been wonderful and a lifesaver from not having to use the competitor tools that cost an arm and a leg
author: Franky S.
pros: It allows me to keep track of all my employees time all in one simple dashboard with all the features to get specific and look up precise time in the month. The screenshots help so much as well.
cons: It didn't always track my employees time correctly at first but it seems they were able to fix that really fast.

review_title: Best tool to monitor employee productivity
author: Prashanth S.
pros: Tasks scheduling Invoicing Tracking the budgets These things are must need for any service company along with the timesheet to check the effectiveness of a project
cons: Tasks tracking can be in Kanban board form like in Trello. Right now it is in another format

review_title: The perfect tool for monitoring the employees activity
author: Mohamed M.
pros: Impressive UI design. It is the best software I have ever used in a while to track time... Super easy to use
cons: Nothing that I can remember... all works perfectly for me
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Useful tool with very clean UI
author: Juraj T.
pros: It is fairly easy to learn all the functions, provides what we need and the UI is built very intuitively with a very clean and light-weigt design.
cons: Some functions seem to be still under development, but it is not a big issue as all the main ones are working very well.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to gain visibility of the entire team
description: Happy to use it! Great job!
author: Sarthak A.
pros: The array of functionalities Apploye provides. The work accomplished by Apploye would easily require two separate products. Since it allows me to view the end to end lifecycle right from time spent by each employee per project till payments, it helps us keep a check on all the ongoing projects.
cons: Nothing specific, but since the app is packed with features, I would love to see an explainer at the beginning of sign up - Atleast for the admin.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Amazing, Easy to Setup, Very Good Pricing. 10/10 Recommend!
description: Great, they continued to make improvements, sometimes, I wish it was easier to manually modify time, but other than that, it is an amazing application for our use.
author: Abner M.
pros: It was very affordable, and provided all the uses I needed for my agency. Support was always fast, and when we first started, it was glitchy, but they fixed all of those issues. Payroll for hourly employees is a breeze to monitor, pay, and track. Love this app for real. We couldn't as a new agency manage our growth without a tool like this.
cons: Nothing, at first it would crash a lot, but the biggest problems have been fixed. So far i am very very happy, and have about 10 users on it and growing.

review_title: Reliable and Easy Team Time Tracking
description: Apploye makes it easy to monitor team hours and activity. Setup was quick, and it’s reliable day-to-day, giving us a clear overview of productivity.
author: Tom P.
pros: Apploye has been a solid choice for keeping our team aligned on hours and activity. Setup was straightforward, and it’s been consistent and dependable in day-to-day use. It gives us a clear picture of team activity at a glance.
cons: Delayed responses sometimes. Faster or more real-time updates in emailed reports would make the experience even smoother.

review_title: The Best Tool for Team Monitoring
description: Apploye is a modern, bug-free productivity tool that far exceeds competitors like Time Doctor. The setup was seamless, and the interface is fast and reliable. It’s the best solution I’ve found for team monitoring, though I’d love to see better features for scheduling future salary increases without affecting past records.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Apploye is a modern, bug-free alternative to Time Doctor. The setup was very easy, and the interface is fast. It is the most reliable tool I have used for monitoring staff productivity and ensuring there is no slacking.
cons: I cannot find a way to update staff salaries so that changes only reflect on future payrolls rather than affecting past records.

review_title: A Reliable Tool for Managing Team Productivity
description: We’ve been using Apploye internally to manage time, projects, and productivity across our teams, and it’s been consistently reliable. It helps us stay organized and transparent about where time is going, which directly improves efficiency. Their support team is responsive and open to feedback. Overall, it’s a simple, effective, and trustworthy tool that does exactly what it promises.
author: Ratul R.
pros: Apploye has been a great addition to our internal operations. The time tracking and productivity monitoring features are super straightforward and reliable. I love how clean and easy the dashboard is — it gives us all the data we need without feeling overwhelming. The mobile app and desktop app both sync really well, which makes team management much easier.
cons: There’s no grace period in billing; if your payment is due, the account is restricted immediately. It’s understandable from a business standpoint, but having a short grace period would make the experience smoother. So it's important to check the billing and card limit.

review_title: Great Tool for Employee Management with Room to Improve
description: I use Apploye to manage my employees' activities and track their tasks. I appreciate its ability to capture screenshots and monitor activities, but wish it could record screen shares or videos. Setup was easy, but there's room for improvement. I rate it a seven out of ten for recommending to others.
author: S M Touhidul I.
pros: I like Apploye for literally everything. I really enjoy being able to track overall things like task-specific work minutes or hours, and adjusting them based on screenshots and activity. The tracking and screenshot features are something I particularly enjoy. The initial setup was very easy, actually.
cons: So, basically, if it records, we can say screen share, video, that would be great. I need this feature.

review_title: Reliable Tool with Exceptional Support
description: Our overall experience with Apploye has been excellent. The tool is reliable and easy to use, which is exactly what we need for time tracking across a growing remote team. But what really makes Apploye stand out is the support. When we encountered a billing issue caused by our bank, their team responded quickly, helped us identify the problem, and offered a short-term solution so our operations would not be interrupted. That level of care and responsiveness truly makes a difference. We are glad we chose Apploye and look forward to continuing with them.
author: Jaycee D.
pros: We've been using Apploye for a few months now mainly for time tracking, and it's been a very smooth experience for our team of 10+. It's simple, effective, and gets the job done without unnecessary complexity. What really stood out recently was the support. We had a billing issue that turned out to be a problem on our bank's side, and Apploye had unexpectedly stopped working. I reached out to support to understand what happened, and they responded quickly and clearly. [sensitive content hidden], in particular, was very helpful and even offered to temporarily activate our account while we sorted out the issue. That kind of support is rare and really appreciated. It reassured us that we’re working with a team that genuinely cares about its users.
cons: Honestly, we haven’t had any negative experiences so far. Everything has worked as expected and the support has been excellent.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Reliable Time Tracking for My Business
description: I’ve been using Apploye for the past 3–4 years and it has been a reliable tool for my business. I mainly use it to track my employees’ time and activities, and it has given me complete visibility into how work is being done. The screenshots, app/website tracking, and timesheets make it easy to monitor productivity and manage payroll accurately. It’s simple to use, my team adapted quickly, and the reports are very helpful for decision-making. Overall, Apploye has made managing remote teams and daily operations much smoother. Highly recommend it to anyone who needs a dependable time tracking and monitoring solution.
author: Rishabh G.
pros: What I like most about Apploye is how easy it is to track time and monitor employee activity. The screenshots, app/website usage tracking, and detailed timesheets give me full visibility, which makes managing productivity and payroll so much smoother. It’s simple, reliable, and my team adapted to it quickly.
cons: Honestly, I haven’t found anything negative so far. The software does exactly what I need it to. I love it!

review_title: A solid time tracking tool with minor limitations
description: My overall experience with Apploye has been great, and I plan to use it for a long time. Hopefully, the app will improve further and add more exciting features!
author: Dewan F.
pros: I like the interface, overall features of the app, and mostly how easy it is to launch, start, and track my time flawlessly. I've been using the tool for almost 7 months, and I must say it hasn't disappointed me till now. The customer support is also lovely. A great tool to have if productivity is the priority.
cons: I think it misses some minor features, like the unavailability of AI suggestions. It would've been nice to see a weekly summary with AI insights.

review_title: Lack of transparency & honesty leads to wasted time
description: Friendly, responsive, and pandering is my unfortunate takeaway. Between two demos and two trials, I spent 4+ hours of time that was entirely avoidable if sales had been transparent about limitations around tasks even though I was exceptionally clear that without a decent import from Asana, including tasks/subtasks and due dates, the software wouldn't work for our business.
author: Jason P.
pros: The two demos and multiple sales support interactions via chat were friendly and fairly responsive.
cons: During the sales demos and my two subsequent trials, I directly asked about specific facets of the Asana integration like support for subtasks. I also mentioned that during my first trial the task due dates didn't seem to import. I was given friendly reassurances and placating words which led me to waste more hours of myself and another member of my team to set up a second demo, only to discover that tasks are very limited and as far as we can tell, only support a creation date and not a due date. In addition, task status did not import via the Asana integration, so Apploye showed ~82,000 open tasks. In addition, I ran into sporadic error notifications during testing (creating the second trial and setting up billing rates for a test project) that impeded my efforts to test the system to confirm it meets our needs.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
